title: Theo's Modpack
description: A modpack made for a friend. Centered around the Create mod.
body:
# A Modpack made for a friend.
Theo's Modpack is my first modpack.
It includes mods such as the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and its addons, [Timeless and Classics Zero](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero), and other mods like the [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) for multiplayer, and a bunch of QoL and performance mods.
**Made for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1.**

### My Socials
**I make videos for my YouTube channel -** [Check it out here !](https://www.youtube.com/@startFX)
